sectionSubtitle: HeadyWeb's eight core capabilities give operators, teams, and builders the tools to compose, customize, and scale AI-powered web experiences.

features.title: Module Federation
features.description: HeadyWeb is built on Webpack 5 Module Federation — the gold standard for micro-frontend architecture. Each of the seven apps is an independently deployed remote module that loads on demand, shares common dependencies from a shared host bundle, and updates without a portal release. Zero coordination overhead between teams.

features.title: 7 Federated Apps
features.description: Seven production-ready AI applications compose the HeadyWeb portal: HeadyDash (command center and system overview), HeadyChat (AI messaging and agent conversations), HeadyDocs (intelligent documentation and knowledge base), HeadyFlow (visual workflow automation), HeadyStore (marketplace browser), HeadyMetrics (analytics and reporting), and HeadyAdmin (platform administration).

features.title: Drag-Drop Builder
features.description: The HeadyWeb Builder lets operators compose custom portal layouts by dragging app panels, widgets, and data views onto a responsive grid. Layouts are saved per-user, per-role, and per-organization, and can be published as templates for team-wide rollout. No code required — from blank canvas to production portal in minutes.

features.title: White-Label Options
features.description: HeadyWeb supports full white-labeling on Pro and Business plans: custom domain with auto-SSL, brand colors and typography, logo replacement, custom email templates, and removal of Heady branding. Deliver the full power of the Heady platform under your own brand identity — without maintaining the infrastructure.

features.title: SSO Integration
features.description: HeadyWeb integrates with any SAML 2.0 or OIDC-compatible identity provider — including Okta, Auth0, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and Ping Identity. A single sign-on session grants access to all seven federated apps with role-based permissions enforced at the module federation layer and verified on every API call.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.description: Presence indicators, shared cursors, and live state synchronization via WebSocket bring real-time collaboration to every HeadyWeb app. Multiple team members can work in HeadyFlow, HeadyDocs, or HeadyDash simultaneously with conflict-free merging powered by CRDTs — the same technology that drives Notion and Figma.

features.title: Custom Domains
features.description: Point any domain or subdomain at your HeadyWeb portal with automatic TLS certificate provisioning via Let's Encrypt, Cloudflare proxy, and a one-minute DNS propagation check built into the setup wizard. Supports wildcard subdomains for white-label multi-tenant deployments.

features.title: Analytics Built-In
features.description: Every HeadyWeb portal ships with HeadyMetrics pre-integrated: page views, app engagement, agent interaction rates, workflow completion funnels, and team productivity metrics — all in a Grafana-powered dashboard with no external analytics setup required. Data stays in your HeadyCloud region, never sold to third parties.
